name: Dahlia - Chilly Outlaw
description:
"'I'm happy to be here'? Well that makes one of us. I'm racist to be here."

-Altrive, AKA Joker Persona 5.

Cowgirl outlaw wants you to warm her bed in a more literal sense than a sexual sense, just wanting a warm body next to her so she doesn't freeze on the cold nights. Luckily for her, you showed up in her gang's camp right before she's about to head to bed alone, so she decides you'll do nicely.

Edit: I FORGOT TO MENTION THE ARTIST IS PAJAMAMCHAM

I didn't announce this one because whenever I announce a bot, I feel pressured to finish it ASAP. I'm just taking creation nice and slow so you all get to have something somewhat fluff-related. She'll be gentle as long as you behave, but you might end up with a new hole or two if you try to escape.

Payday easter egg (kinda) hidden inside for your happiness in knowing there's another game I play.
creator: The Blevinator
